title: Rich Roasted Dutch Chicken Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful Dutch stew made with roasted chicken, vegetables, and aromatic spices, cooked to perfection in a clay pot. This dish is perfect for a cold winter's night.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the chicken thighs with salt, black pepper, and dried thyme.
Heat the olive oil in the clay pot over medium heat and sear the chicken thighs until browned on all sides.
Add the chopped onion to the clay pot and cook until softened.
Add the chopped carrots and potatoes to the clay pot and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the chicken broth to the clay pot and bring to a boil.
Cover the clay pot with a lid and transfer to the preheated oven.
Roast the stew in the oven for 30 minutes.
Remove the clay pot from the oven and stir in the chopped chives.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with additional chopped chives if desired.
